# Test fixtures

Drop any small `cat.jpg` (or other ImageNet-class image) here for the e2e
test and the k6 load script. A handful of public-domain options:

```bash
curl -L -o tests/fixtures/cat.jpg \
  https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/4d/Cat_November_2010-1a.jpg/640px-Cat_November_2010-1a.jpg
```
